fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema

fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.
fields.label: Required Input Fields
fields.name: required_input_fields

fields.description: Input row field containing the absolute HTTP(S) URL to fetch.
fields.label: URL Field
fields.name: url_field

fields.description: Output field receiving the payload-store content hash.
fields.label: Blob Ref Field
fields.name: blob_ref_field

fields.description: Output field receiving the normalized response Content-Type.
fields.label: Content Type Field
fields.name: content_type_field

fields.description: Output field receiving the response body size.
fields.label: Size Bytes Field
fields.name: size_bytes_field

fields.description: Output field receiving the response body SHA-256 hex digest.
fields.label: Sha256 Field
fields.name: sha256_field

fields.description: Output field receiving the HTTP status code.
fields.label: Fetch Status Field
fields.name: fetch_status_field

fields.description: Output field receiving the final logical URL after redirects.
fields.label: Fetch URL Final Field
fields.name: fetch_url_final_field

fields.description: Output field receiving the final resolved IP.
fields.label: Fetch URL Final Ip Field
fields.name: fetch_url_final_ip_field

fields.description: Exact normalized response Content-Type values accepted for storage.
fields.label: Allowed Content Types
fields.name: allowed_content_types

fields.description: HTTP fetching policy, timeout, contact, and host allowlist settings.
fields.label: HTTP
fields.name: http
